title: DWSD Director
insight: Detroit likely manages a municipal water utility serving roughly 255,644 metered connections (population 639,111). The Public Works / DPS office handles meters, billing, and field service. As a Tier 1 system in Wayne County, this is a strategic enterprise opportunity. Scale supports a multi-year AMI program with district-level visibility. Best suited for enterprise AMI + non-revenue-water visibility. Lead with district-level water-loss visibility, MDM integration, and a phased deployment plan. Position EJP as the long-term partner, not just a meter vendor.
